person.name: Roger de Englefield

memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Roger Englefield Knight of The Shire

burialPlace.address: Saint Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Sir Roger de Englefield was the eldest son of Sir William de Englefield, who died in France during the reign of Edward I.

"Sir Roger de Englefield, was returned one of the knights for Berkshire, in the parliament 6th Edward II. 1313, and dying 36th Edward III. 1362..."

«b»Children of Sir Roger de Englefield and his wife Joan (Unknown):«/b»
1.) Alice, m. Mortely

2.) Philip (Sir)

3.) William

zh.Englefield, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏恩格利費爾德
zh.Saint Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshi: 英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.of Englefield, Berks., Engl: 英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Englefield於大約1292年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德時，他的父親William de Englefield23歲，母親Margery de Englefield14歲。他於1347年與Joan Burnett在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1362年在英國波克夏恩格利費爾德享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Englefield于大约1292年出生在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德时，他的父亲William de Englefield23岁，母亲Margery de Englefield14岁。他于1347年与Joan Burnett在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1362年在英国波克夏恩格利費爾德享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Englefield was born about 1292, in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Englefield, was 23 and his mother, Margery de Englefield, was 14. He married Joan Burnett in 1347, in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1362, in Englefield, Berkshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger d’Englefield est né environ 1292, à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d’Englefield, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margery d’Englefield, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Joan Burnett en 1347, à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1362, à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1347 in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Burnett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Englefield, Berkshire, England und wurde in St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Burnett nel 1347, nel Englefield, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Englefieldが約1292年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドで生まれた時，父William de Englefieldは23歳，母Margery de Englefieldは14歳であった。1347年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドでJoan Burnettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1362年にイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドスト マーク'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshi: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드 스트 마k'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Englefield(이)가 대략 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Englefield(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Englefield(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드에서 Joan Burnett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1362년 영국 버크실르 잉글레필드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드 스트 마k'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshi: ст марк'с чурч, энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Englefield родился около 1292 г. в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Englefield было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Englefield, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Burnett в 1347 г. в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ст марк'с чурч, энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
